{"problem_standardized_math":"Write down the Karush-Kuhn-Tucker conditions for the convex quadratic program\n\\[\n\\min_x\\; q(x)=\\frac{1}{2}x^T Gx+x^T c\n\\quad\\text{subject to}\\quad\nAx\\ge b,\\qquad \\bar A x=\\bar b,\n\\]\nwhere \\(G\\) is symmetric and positive semidefinite. Then use these conditions to derive an analogue of the generic primal-dual step (16.58) for this problem."}
